task: A few people keep asking me to come out after dark, and I’m trying to decide what to say back without turning it into a whole argument. What’s a simple way to handle the back-and-forth if I already have something else going on?

turns.agent_response:
A simple, non-argumentative reply is:

**“I can’t tonight—I already have plans. Maybe another time.”**

If they keep pushing, just repeat a shorter version:

**“Not tonight.”**  
**“I’m busy, thanks.”**  
**“I’m going to pass.”**

You don’t need to explain more than that. If you want, I can help you make it sound more casual, firmer, or friendlier.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and clean. I’d probably just hit them with “can’t tonight, got stuff going on” and leave it there. If they keep pressing, just same answer again, no extra details.
